name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ state[p] = "idle"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>
          \/ /\ state[p] = "trying"
             /\ turn' = p
             /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>
          \/ /\ state[p] = "critical"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants


vars == <<participants, coordinator>>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "init"]
        /\ coordinator = "init"

Prepare == /\ coordinator = "init"
           /\ coordinator' = "prepare"
           /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes == /\ coordinator = "prepare"
           /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = "init"
           /\ coordinator' = "voteYes"
           /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "voteYes" \E p \in Participants]

VoteNo == /\ coordinator = "prepare"
          /\ \E p \in Participants: participants[p] = "init"
          /\ coordinator' = "voteNo"
          /\ UNCHANGED participants

Commit == /\ coordinator = "voteYes"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = "voteYes"
          /\ coordinator' = "commit"
          /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "commit" \E p \in Participants]

Abort == /\ coordinator = "voteYes" \/ coordinator = "voteNo"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = "init" \/ participants[p] = "voteYes"
          /\ coordinator' = "abort"
          /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "abort" \E p \in Participants]

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES forks, philosophers


\* State variables
vars == <<philosophers, forks>>

\* philosophers[i] == "thinking", "hungry", or "eating"
philosophers == [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

\* forks[i] == i if philosopher i holds fork i, otherwise 0
forks == [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

\* Helper predicates
left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* A philosopher can eat if both adjacent forks are free
canEat(i) == forks[left(i)] = 0 /\ forks[right(i)] = 0

\* Actions
\* Philosopher i tries to eat
TryEat(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "hungry"
            /\ canEat(i)
            /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
            /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = i, ![right(i)] = i]

\* Philosopher i puts down forks
PutDown(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "eating"
             /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
             /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = 0, ![right(i)] = 0]

\* Philosopher i becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(i) == /\ philosophers[i] = "thinking"
                  /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                  /\ forks' = forks

\* Next-state relation
Next == \E i \in 1..N : 
          \E action \in {TryEat, PutDown, BecomeHungry} : 
              action(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => flag[j] = FALSE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == 
    /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

Next == 
    \* Producer action: enqueue if not full
    \/ /\ size < K
       /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  \* Enqueue 1
       /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
       /\ size' = size + 1
       /\ head' = head
    \* Consumer action: dequeue if not empty
    \/ /\ size > 0
       /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Dequeue (set to 0)
       /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
       /\ size' = size - 1
       /\ tail' = tail
    \* No-op when full or empty
    \/ /\ size = K
       /\ q' = q
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
       /\ size' = size
    \/ /\ size = 0
       /\ q' = q
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = tail
       /\ size' = size

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ state[i] = "Follower"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
             /\ votedFor' = votedFor
             /\ state' = state
          \/ /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
             /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
             /\ state' = state
          \/ /\ state[i] = "Leader"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
             /\ votedFor' = votedFor
             /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {NULL}]
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}]

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Channels, InitState, InitChannelState, State
VARIABLES channelState, state


vars == <<state, channelState>>

Init == 
  /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> InitState(p)]
  /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> InitChannelState(c)]

Next == 
  \/ /\ \E p \in 1..N :
       /\ state[p] = InitState(p)
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = NextState(p, state[p])]
       /\ channelState' = channelState
  \/ /\ \E c \in Channels :
       /\ channelState[c] = InitChannelState(c)
       /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = NextChannelState(c, channelState[c])]
       /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in [1..N -> InitState(1)..InitState(N)]
  /\ channelState \in [Channels -> InitChannelState(1)..InitChannelState(N)]
  /\ vars \in [state -> [1..N -> InitState(1)..InitState(N)],
               channelState -> [Channels -> InitChannelState(1)..InitChannelState(N)]]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in [1..N -> [msg: BOOLEAN, dest: 1..N]]

Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![token] = [msg: FALSE, dest: token]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ messages \in [1..N -> [msg: BOOLEAN, dest: 1..N]]

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == << store >>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ \E k \in Keys :
        /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, NONE

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised |-> 0, accepted |-> <<0, NONE>>]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> NONE]]
  /\ chosen = <<0, NONE>>

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [promised |-> b, accepted |-> acceptors[i].accepted]

          acceptors[i]]
  /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> IF j = p THEN [ballot |-> b, value |-> proposers[j].value] ELSE proposers[j]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, b) == 
  LET promises == {acceptors[i].accepted | i \in 1..N} IN
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> IF j = p THEN [ballot |-> b, value |-> CHOOSE v \in promises: v[1] = MAX(promises)[1] /\ v[2] \in V] ELSE proposers[j]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF acceptors[i].promised = b THEN [promised: b, accepted: <<b, v>>] ELSE acceptors[i]]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Chosen(v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = <<1, v>>

Next == 
  \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
    /\ proposers[p].value = v
    /\ proposers[p].ballot = b
    /\ Prepare(p, b)
    \/ Promise(p, b)
    \/ Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E v \in V : Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [promised: Int, accepted: <<Int, V>>]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Int, value: V \cup {NONE}]]
  /\ chosen \in <<Int, V \cup {NONE}>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, Chunks
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..totalChunks |-> 0]
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..totalChunks |-> SubSeq(Seq(1..FILE_SIZE), (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE))]
    /\ totalChunks = Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)

SendChunk == 
    /\ \E chunkIdx \in 1..totalChunks \setminus sentChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {chunkIdx}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![chunkIdx] = retransmitCount[chunkIdx] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ackedChunks, fileChunks, totalChunks>>

AckChunk == 
    /\ \E chunkIdx \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {chunkIdx}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, fileChunks, totalChunks>>

RetransmitChunk == 
    /\ \E chunkIdx \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[chunkIdx] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![chunkIdx] = retransmitCount[chunkIdx] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks, fileChunks, totalChunks>>

GiveUpChunk == 
    /\ \E chunkIdx \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[chunkIdx] >= MAX_RETRIES
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, fileChunks, totalChunks>>

Next == 
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ AckChunk
    \/ RetransmitChunk
    \/ GiveUpChunk

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
    /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..totalChunks
    /\ ackedChunks \subseteq sentChunks
    /\ \A chunkIdx \in 1..totalChunks: retransmitCount[chunkIdx] \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ fileChunks \in [1..totalChunks -> Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ totalChunks = Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS MaxTx, MaxKey, MaxVal, MaxTxSize, MaxTxOps, MaxTxRead, MaxTxWrite
VARIABLES db, txs


    \* Transaction states
    TxBegin, TxRead, TxWrite, TxCommit, TxAbort, TxEnd

TxStates == {TxBegin, TxRead, TxWrite, TxCommit, TxAbort, TxEnd}

TxOps == {TxRead, TxWrite}

TxOp == [op: TxOps, key: 1..MaxKey, val: 1..MaxVal]

Tx == [state: TxStates, ops: Seq(TxOp), cur: 1..Len(ops), snapshot: [1..MaxKey -> 1..MaxVal], writeSet: [1..MaxKey -> 1..MaxVal], readSet: [1..MaxKey -> 1..MaxVal], abort: BOOLEAN]

Txs == [1..MaxTx -> Tx]

DB == [1..MaxKey -> 1..MaxVal]

vars == <<db, txs>>

Init == /\ db = [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> 1]
        /\ txs = [t \in 1..MaxTx |-> [state |-> TxEnd, ops |-> <<>>, cur |-> 1, snapshot |-> [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> 1], writeSet |-> [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> 1], readSet |-> [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> 1], abort |-> FALSE]]

TxBeginStep(t) == /\ txs[t].state = TxEnd
                 /\ txs[t].ops = <<>>
                 /\ txs[t].cur = 1
                 /\ txs[t].snapshot = [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> 1]
                 /\ txs[t].writeSet = [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> 1]
                 /\ txs[t].readSet = [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> 1]
                 /\ txs[t].abort = FALSE
                 /\ txs' = [txs EXCEPT ![t] = [@ EXCEPT !state = TxBegin]]

TxReadStep(t, op) == /\ txs[t].state = TxBegin \/ txs[t].state = TxRead
                    /\ txs[t].ops = Append(txs[t].ops, op)
                    /\ txs[t].cur = Len(txs[t].ops)
                    /\ txs[t].snapshot = db
                    /\ txs[t].writeSet = [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> 1]
                    /\ txs[t].readSet = [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> 1]
                    /\ txs[t].abort = FALSE
                    /\ txs[t].state = TxRead
                    /\ txs' = [txs EXCEPT ![t] = [@ EXCEPT !state = TxRead]]

TxWriteStep(t, op) == /\ txs[t].state = TxBegin \/ txs[t].state = TxWrite
                     /\ txs[t].ops = Append(txs[t].ops, op)
                     /\ txs[t].cur = Len(txs[t].ops)
                     /\ txs[t].snapshot = db
                     /\ txs[t].writeSet = [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> IF k = op.key THEN op.val ELSE txs[t].writeSet[k]]
                     /\ txs[t].readSet = [k \in 1..MaxKey |-> IF k = op.key THEN op.val ELSE txs[t].readSet[k]]
                     /\ txs[t].abort = FALSE
                     /\ txs[t].state = TxWrite
                     /\ txs' = [txs EXCEPT ![t] = [@ EXCEPT !state = TxWrite]]

TxCommitStep(t) == /\ txs[t].state = TxWrite
                  /\ txs[t].abort = FALSE
                  /\ txs[t].state = TxCommit
                  /\ txs' = [txs EXCEPT ![t] = [@ EXCEPT !state = TxCommit]]

TxAbortStep(t) == /\ txs[t].state = TxWrite \/ txs[t].state = TxRead
                  /\ txs[t].abort = TRUE
                  /\ txs[t].state = TxAbort
                  /\ txs' = [txs EXCEPT ![t] = [@ EXCEPT !state = TxAbort]]

TxEndStep(t) == /\ txs[t].state = TxCommit \/ txs[t].state = TxAbort
                /\ txs[t].state = TxEnd
                /\ txs' = [txs EXCEPT ![t] = [@ EXCEPT !state = TxEnd]]

TxStep(t) == TxBeginStep(t) \/ TxReadStep(t, TxRead(key, val)) \/ TxWriteStep(t, TxWrite(key, val)) \/ TxCommitStep(t) \/ TxAbortStep(t) \/ TxEndStep(t)

Next == \E t \in 1..MaxTx: TxStep(t)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ db \in [1..MaxKey -> 1..MaxVal]
          /\ txs \in [1..MaxTx -> Tx]
          /\ \A t \in 1..MaxTx: txs[t].state \in TxStates
          /\ \A t \in 1..MaxTx: txs[t].ops \in Seq(TxOp)
          /\ \A t \in 1..MaxTx: txs[t].cur \in 1..Len(txs[t].ops)
          /\ \A t \in 1..MaxTx: txs[t].snapshot \in [1..MaxKey -> 1..MaxVal]
          /\ \A t \in 1..MaxTx: txs[t].writeSet \in [1..MaxKey -> 1..MaxVal]
          /\ \A t \in 1..MaxTx: txs[t].readSet \in [1..MaxKey -> 1..MaxVal]
          /\ \A t \in 1..MaxTx: txs[t].abort \in BOOLEAN

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + RandomDrift]
        /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => offsets' = offsets

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]   \* Add more type checks if needed

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 0

Next == \/ /\ flag[0] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ flag[0] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ turn' = turn
        \/ /\ flag[0] = TRUE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[0] = TRUE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 0
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ flag \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 0..1

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, T
VARIABLES infected, known


vars == << known, infected >>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N: \E j \in 1..N: i # j
          /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN known[k] \cup known[j] ELSE known[k]]
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \/ infected[j] ELSE infected[k]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Allocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Client, Pages

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = {1 .. N}
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ client \in Client
          /\ pages \in SUBSET Pages
          /\ pages \subseteq free
          /\ free' = free \ pages
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![client] = @ \cup pages]
        \/ /\ client \in Client
          /\ pages \in SUBSET Pages
          /\ pages \subseteq allocated[client]
          /\ free' = free \cup pages
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![client] = @ \setminus pages]
        \/ /\ free' = free
          /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Client: c1 /= c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Subscribers, Topics

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

Init == /\ subscribers = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
        /\ messages = [t \in Topics |-> <<>>]

Next == /\ \E t \in Topics : \E s \in Subscribers :
          /\ s \in subscribers[t]
          /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], s)]
          /\ subscribers' = subscribers
        \/ \E t \in Topics : \E s \in Subscribers :
          /\ ~(s \in subscribers[t])
          /\ messages' = messages
          /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {s}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants
      \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = wants
      \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = wants
      \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in 1..2
          /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node
VARIABLES counts

vars == <<counts>>

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<counts>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
          /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Nat
